series_metadata.series_description: This record file contains Enforcement files involving confidential information, including complaints and supplemental material filed with the Board pursuant to ORC 4725; documents relating to the processing of complaints; information relating to investigations, including reports of investigations, correspondence and memoranda, subpoenas, and related documents, orders to evaluation, consent agreements, notices of opportunity for hearing, cautionary letters, skills or knowledge test completed by licensees; federal databank reports; any disciplinary actions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned electronic medium storage and scan is checked accuracy; ; Electronic: indefinitely
